item.title: Rugby-League
item.description: The Fiji Airways Men's National 7s side is pooled with France, the USA, and hosts Spain at the upcoming World Championship in Valladolid, Spain, at the end of this month.
item.content:encoded: The Fiji Airways Men's National 7s side is pooled with France, the USA, and hosts Spain at the upcoming World Championship in Valladolid, Spain, at the end of this month.
